pi_items.source: Task description explicitly lists these 6 exact tiddler titles, which are also hardcoded in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
Task description mandates 'Be tagged with both GDD and EchoesOfTheVoid', which is enforced in export_result.sh.
Task description requires 'Each contain at least 80 words', which is verified in export_result.sh via 'words >= 80'.
Task description requires creating 'ALL of the following 6 tiddlers', and verifier logic checks for at least 6.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic Game Design Document (GDD) wiki for a fictional game named 'Echoes of the Void'. The 6 required tiddlers are 'Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub', 'Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics', 'Echoes of the Void - Character Roster', 'Echoes of the Void - World Design', 'Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative', and 'Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements'. Each tiddler must have at least 80 words and contain the tags 'GDD' and 'EchoesOfTheVoid'. The task does not use a provided external dataset; all content is synthetically generated by the agent.
